Task description specifies store name; unverifiable without execution
Confirmed as real Natural Earth dataset at 1:110m scale in 110m_cultural collection; available on naturalearthdata.com and GitHub nvkelso/natural-earth-vector repository
Confirmed as real Natural Earth dataset at 1:110m scale in 110m_physical collection; available on naturalearthdata.com
Environment setup README (lines 30-40) confirms Natural Earth shapefiles are downloaded and extracted to /home/ga/natural_earth during environment initialization
Task description specifies this target; docker-compose.yml confirms GEOSERVER_DATA_DIR=/opt/geoserver/data_dir; path structure is valid but unverifiable without execution
Task requirement for WMS GetMap output; unverifiable without execution
Task requirement for WMS GetMap output; unverifiable without execution

Natural Earth official specification: all Natural Earth vector data use Geographic coordinate system with WGS84 datum (EPSG:4326). Confirmed in search results for Natural Earth dataset specifications and GitHub repository documentation
Confirmed via naturalearathdata.com and GitHub: Natural Earth is described as 'free vector and raster map data' available for public download at multiple scales
GeoServer official documentation confirms 'Directory of spatial files' is a valid datastore type for storing and publishing shapefiles. This is standard GeoServer terminology

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, publicly-available Natural Earth 110m scale shapefiles (ne_110m_admin_0_countries and ne_110m_lakes) which are obtained from naturalearthdata.com and stored in the environment at /home/ga/natural_earth. Natural Earth data are in the public domain and use the WGS84 geographic coordinate system (EPSG:4326). GeoServer version 2.25.2 is used with the 'Directory of spatial files' datastore type, which is a standard GeoServer feature for publishing shapefile collections. The task requires creating a workspace named 'shp_ne' and publishing the two layers as a directory-based shapefile store in GeoServer.
